_comment: Synthetic demo threat-intel feed. Values are illustrative, not live intelligence. Swap load_threat_intel() for a real feed (e.g. MISP, OTX, internal blocklist) in production.

indicators.notes: Known Tor exit node observed proxying C2 traffic in prior incidents.
Associated with commodity malware C2 infrastructure.
